gigapan.name: marriot garden (l62)
gigapan.description:
I ran into my Dad and Step Mom.  They were on a tear to go check out the Marriot.  They were told it was beautiful.  And of course it was.  But I don't know how 'beautiful' it really strikes me, as compared with some of the places I photographed.  It is a manicured beauty, a tended beauty.  Somehow artificial.  The beauty of an over decorated haute cuisine meal when compared with fresh fish speared in the afternoon and thrown on the campfire in the evening.  There are no bloody scales in the beauty of the marriot.

(141mm equivalent)
